name: WEX Inc.
business: WEX is a global commerce platform providing embedded payment solutions across Mobility, Benefits, and Corporate Payments segments. It offers fleet payment solutions, employee benefits administration software, and B2B payment processing services. Customers include businesses, government agencies, financial institutions, and employers of all sizes.
sellsTo: businesses and government agencies with commercial vehicles
companies in travel, fintech, insurance, consumer bill pay, and media verticals

exposures.sentence: We advanced our Embedded Payments strategy beyond the core travel vertical by launching new flexible funding capabilities and significantly expanding our fintech pipeline.
We support fleets of all sizes globally through our proprietary closed-loop networks and a suite of software solutions that help manage fuel, EV charging, and operational workflows.

WEX continued to deploy artificial intelligence (AI)-driven tools within areas such as fraud prevention, product development, credit management, and customer support, where the technology has, among other things, boosted productivity and increased product innovation velocity.

catalysts.event: Signed long-term agreement with BP for its U.S. commercial card portfolio business
catalysts.sentence: We signed a long-term agreement with major fuel retailer BP for its U.S. commercial card portfolio business.
